summary: Iteration 47: Tested Safari mobile fixes and ISO page color styling. All 10 requirements verified - mobile loads correctly (no blank screen), wordmark visible, bottom nav works with 5 icons, bee emoji present in daily prompt, ISO page badges/buttons now use amber instead of purple/green/blue colors.
passed_tests: 1. App loads on mobile (390x844) without blank screen - landing page (240k chars content), login page, and Hive page all render correctly - VERIFIED
2. Mobile top bar wordmark shows without clipping - dimensions 42.89x36px, x=12 y=9.5 (within viewport, correct aspect ratio) - VERIFIED
3. Mobile bottom nav shows 5 icons (Hive, Explore, Search, Collection, Honeypot) - all visible and navigation works - VERIFIED
4. Daily prompt card 'buzz in 🐝' button shows literal bee emoji (user already buzzed in, shows '🐝 2' streak) - VERIFIED
5. Notification badge uses amber #C8861A (rgb(200, 134, 26)) - code verified in Navbar.js line 398 (bg-[#C8861A]) - VERIFIED via code review
6. ISO tab: Community ISO SEARCHING badge uses amber (bg-[#E8A820]/15 text-[#C8861A] border border-[#C8861A]/30) NOT purple - VERIFIED
7. 'I have this' button uses amber (bg-[#E8A820]/15 text-[#C8861A]) NOT green - VERIFIED
8. ListingCard BUY_NOW badge uses amber (bg-amber-100/60 text-[#C8861A]) NOT green - VERIFIED
9. Make Offer submit button uses amber (bg-[#C8861A] text-white hover:bg-[#B07516]) NOT blue - VERIFIED via ISOPage.js line 780
10. Mark Found button uses amber (text-[#C8861A] hover:bg-amber-50) NOT green - color rgb(200, 134, 26) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: Safari SVG jarFill CSS animation was removed from App.css (line 165 comment)
-webkit-backdrop-filter prefix added in index.css line 118 for Safari compatibility
Mobile wordmark uses h-[36px] w-auto max-w-[130px] object-contain - properly sized for mobile bar
All ISO page color fixes verified: SEARCHING badge, I have this button, Mark Found button, Make Offer button all use amber (#C8861A/#E8A820) instead of purple/green/blue
BUY_NOW and MAKE_OFFER listing type badges use amber-100/60 variant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 complete. All Safari mobile fixes and ISO page color styling verified: 1) App loads on mobile 390x844 without blank screen, 2) Mobile wordmark visible at 42.89x36px, 3) Bottom nav 5 icons work, 4) Daily prompt has bee emoji, 5) Notification badge amber, 6-10) All ISO page badges/buttons now amber instead of purple/green/blue. Frontend was restarted during testing to pick up hot reload changes. No issues found.
